testcase.name: test_async_to_sync_to_thread_decorator

failure.message: assert <Thread(ThreadPoolExecutor-3_0, stopped 139735502845504)> == <_MainThread(MainThread, started 139735564137536)> + where <_MainThread(MainThread, started 139735564137536)> = <function current_thread at 0x7f16b8489120>() + where <function current_thread at 0x7f16b8489120> = threading.current_thread

testcase.failure: E assert <Thread(ThreadPoolExecutor-3_0, stopped 139735502845504)> == <_MainThread(MainThread, started 139735564137536)> + where <_MainThread(MainThread, started 139735564137536)> = <function current_thread at 0x7f16b8489120>() + where <function current_thread at 0x7f16b8489120> = threading.current_thread

testcase.name: test_async_to_sync_method_self_attribute

failure.message: AttributeError: 'AsyncToSync' object has no attribute '__self__'. Did you mean: '__call__'?
